document.title: Post-Market Clinical Follow-up Evaluation Report for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
standards: MDR Annex XIV, Part B - Post-market clinical follow-up
MDCG 2020-7 Post-market clinical follow-up (PMCF) Plan Template
MDCG 2020-8 Post-market clinical follow-up (PMCF) Evaluation Report Template

sourceSummary.oneLine: Rev. 2 PMCF Evaluation Report for H&abyz Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW under EU MDR.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports CE/MDR technical documentation by documenting PMCF activities, survey and literature/recall screening results, clinical safety and performance conclusions, and impacts on CER and risk management files.
keyPoints: The PMCF report states that activities were conducted as planned with no deviations from the PMCF plan.
Customer satisfaction survey data from 8 healthcare professionals/distributors found no additional safety or performance risks, and no customer complaints were reported.
Literature and recall screening found no additional confirmed literature and zero FDA, MFDS, and MHRA recall cases for the searched terms and period.
The device is classified as Class IIb under Rule 10 of Annex VIII of Regulation (EU) 2017/745, with expected lifetime of 5 years.
The report concludes that no additional impact on clinical safety and performance was identified and no preventive or corrective measures were needed.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Manufacturer's Name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.; address in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea.

entities.name: Javitech Consulting GmbH
entities.evidence: Authorised Representative name: Javitech Consulting GmbH; address Sachsenhausener Str.16, 65824 Schwalbach a. Ts. Germany.

entities.name: Hur, Namkyu
entities.evidence: Approved by Hur, Namkyu QMR / PRRC Sep 01, 2025; PRRC name listed as Hur, Namkyu.

entities.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
entities.evidence: Product name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector; Model name: A1717MCW / A1417MCW / F1417MCW.

entities.name: Carestream Health, Inc.
entities.evidence: DRX-1 of Carestream Health, Inc. is listed under evaluation of clinical data relating to equivalent or similar devices.

entities.name: Canon
entities.evidence: CXDI-70C of Canon and CXDI-31 of Canon are listed as equivalent or similar devices.

concepts.name: PMCF evaluation under EU MDR
concepts.evidence: MDR considers PMCF a continuous process that updates clinical evaluation and is addressed in the manufacturer's post-market surveillance plan.

concepts.name: Device intended purpose
concepts.evidence: The detector is indicated for digital imaging for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting adults and children.

concepts.name: Device contraindications
concepts.evidence: Not to be used for mammography, infant and pregnant women, fluoroscopy, and angiography.

concepts.name: PMCF survey results
concepts.evidence: A total of 8 healthcare professionals/distributors were surveyed; no additional risks related to performance and safety were found.

concepts.name: Recall and alert screening
concepts.evidence: FDA Recall, MFDS Recall and suspension of sale, and MHRA Alerts and recalls each reported 0 results.

concepts.name: Technical documentation impact
concepts.evidence: Relevant information from the clinical evaluation report and risk management file were considered, monitored, and linked to A-TCF-5-118 and A-TCF-5-104.

evidence.claim: The document is Rev. 2 of PMCF Evaluation Report A-PMCFR-5-001 dated Sep 01, 2025.
evidence.evidenceText: Technical Documentation Document No. A-PMCFR-5-001; Rev. No. 2; Post-market Clinical Follow-up Evaluation Report; Rev. Date Sep 01, 2025.

evidence.claim: The covered product is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector with models A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: Product name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector; Model name: A1717MCW / A1417MCW / F1417MCW.

evidence.claim: The Rev. 2 change was an update to the EU Representative.
evidence.evidenceText: Revision No. 2; Rev. Date Sep 01, 2025; Revision Description: Update EU Representative.

evidence.claim: The PMCF evaluation report is required to document findings from PMCF plan activities and form part of the clinical evaluation report and technical documentation.
evidence.evidenceText: The manufacturer shall analyse findings from PMCF plan activities and document results in this PMCF evaluation report that shall be part of the clinical evaluation report and technical documentation.

evidence.claim: The manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd. with SRN KR-MF-000020684.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer's Name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.; SRN KR-MF-000020684.

evidence.claim: The authorised representative is Javitech Consulting GmbH in Germany.
evidence.evidenceText: Authorised Representative name: Javitech Consulting GmbH; Address: Sachsenhausener Str.16, 65824 Schwalbach a. Ts. Germany.

evidence.claim: The device supports wired or wireless digital radiography and auto exposure detection without generator integration.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW are wired or wireless digital flat panel detectors; detectors support auto exposure detection technology without generator integration.

evidence.claim: The intended purpose is general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children, replacing film-based radiographic diagnostic systems.
evidence.evidenceText: Indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children; intended to replace film based radiographic diagnostic systems.

evidence.claim: The intended users are radiologists and medical imaging specialists with healthcare professional training.
evidence.evidenceText: Education: Completed a healthcare professional training; Knowledge: Qualified as a radiologist; Experience: Radiologist, medical imaging specialists.

evidence.claim: The Basic UDI-DI is 88000704HAAP-27U.
evidence.evidenceText: 3.6 Basic UDI-DI 88000704HAAP-27U.

evidence.claim: The intended patient population includes adults and children except infants and excludes pregnant women.
evidence.evidenceText: Age group Adult and Children (except infants); Patient group/state except pregnant women.

evidence.claim: The device is contraindicated for mammography, infants, pregnant women, fluoroscopy, and angiography.
evidence.evidenceText: Not to be used for mammography. Not to be used for infant and pregnant women. Not to be used for fluoroscopy and angiography.

evidence.claim: The device has EMDN code Z11031180 for direct digital radiology hardware accessories.
evidence.evidenceText: EMDN Code Z11031180; English draft term: SYSTEMS FOR DIRECT DIGITAL RADIOLOGY (DR) - HARDWARE ACCESSORIES.

evidence.claim: The device is Class IIb under Rule 10 of Annex VIII of Regulation (EU) 2017/745.
evidence.evidenceText: Class IIb in accordance with rule 10 of Annex VIII Regulation (EU) 2017/745.

evidence.claim: The expected device lifetime is 5 years.
evidence.evidenceText: 3.16 Expected lifetime 5 years.

evidence.claim: PMCF activities were conducted using surveys and screening scientific literature and other sources of clinical data, with no deviations from the plan.
evidence.evidenceText: PMCF evaluation using two methods set in the PMCF Plan: C.1 Surveys; C.2 Screening scientific literature and other sources of clinical data; no deviations from the PMCF plan.

evidence.claim: No new critical performance or safety issues were found during this PMCF.
evidence.evidenceText: There were no new critical issues regarding the performance or safety of the device at this PMCF.

evidence.claim: The customer satisfaction survey covered 8 healthcare professionals/distributors and identified no additional safety or performance risks.
evidence.evidenceText: A total of 8 healthcare professionals/distributors were surveyed; no additional risks related to the performance and safety of the product were found through the survey.

evidence.claim: There were no customer complaints regarding the product during the survey period.
evidence.evidenceText: There were no customer complaints regarding the product during the survey period.

evidence.claim: Scientific literature screening found no additional confirmed literature.
evidence.evidenceText: Scientific literature database - Literature search: There was no additional confirmed literature.

evidence.claim: FDA, MFDS, and MHRA recall or alert searches returned zero results for the searched terms and date range.
evidence.evidenceText: FDA Recall 0; MFDS Recall and suspension of sale 0; MHRA Alerts and recalls for drugs and medical devices 0; advance search May 06, 2024 to December 31, 2024.

evidence.claim: The report identifies DRX-1, CXDI-70C, and CXDI-31 as equivalent or similar devices with equivalent clinical performance supported by the Clinical Evaluation Report.
evidence.evidenceText: DRX-1, CXDI-70C, and CXDI-31 entries state the product was confirmed to have equivalent clinical performance through Clinical Evaluation Report Doc No. A-TCF-5-118.

evidence.claim: The PMCF results considered and referenced CER A-TCF-5-118 Rev.4 and Risk Management Report A-TCF-5-104 Rev.6.
evidence.evidenceText: Refer to A-TCF-5-118 Clinical Evaluation Report (Rev.4); Refer to A-TCF-5-104 Risk Management Report (Rev.6).

evidence.claim: The report applies MDR Annex XIV Part B and MDCG 2020-7/2020-8 PMCF guidance documents.
evidence.evidenceText: References applied: MDR Annex XIV, Part B; MDCG 2020-7 PMCF Plan Template; MDCG 2020-8 PMCF Evaluation Report Template.

evidence.claim: The overall PMCF conclusion is that no additional impact on clinical safety and performance was identified and no preventive or corrective measures are needed.
evidence.evidenceText: No additional impact on clinical safety and performance was identified through PMCF activities; Need for preventive and/or corrective measures: None.

evidence.claim: The PMCF evaluation report timeline is annual, with first report dated December 31, 2024 and second report planned for December 2025.
evidence.evidenceText: Reported date of the first report: December 31, 2024; Planned date of the second report: December 2025; Timeline: Once a year.

reviewFlags.reason: The PMCF activity summary uses placeholders such as 'X related Survey' and 'X related Literature', which may require confirmation against source data.
Recall and alert search date range is May 06, 2024 to December 31, 2024, while the report revision date is Sep 01, 2025.
The section numbering repeats 5.1 for CXDI-31 after 5.1 DRX-1 and 5.2 CXDI-70C.
